code: import React from'react';import{Navigate}from'react-router-dom';import{useAuth}from'../../contexts/AuthContext';import LoadingSpinner from'../LoadingSpinner/LoadingSpinner';import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";const ProtectedRoute=_ref=>{let{children}=_ref;const{isAuthenticated,isLoading}=useAuth();if(isLoading){return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(LoadingSpinner,{fullScreen:true});}if(!isAuthenticated){return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Navigate,{to:"/login",replace:true});}return children;};export default ProtectedRoute;
